reviews.comment:
Buena atención, playeros respetuosos del cliente, falta variedad y producto en el Full en ocasiones,...y la limpieza en los baños es digna de aplausos.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, beach attendants who are respectful of customers. The Full is sometimes lacking in variety and products...and the cleanliness of the bathrooms is worthy of applause.
